Title: Successful Login
Preconditions: User account exists in the database.
Test Steps:
1. User initiates login request with valid credentials.
2. Server receives the login request and queries the database for the user.
3. Database returns the user data.
4. Server verifies the credentials and returns success.
5. Client receives the success response.
Expected Result: Client successfully logs in and receives user data.

Title: Failed Login Attempt
Preconditions: User account exists in the database.
Test Steps:
1. User initiates login request with invalid username and valid password.
2. Server receives the login request and queries the database for the user.
3. Database returns no user data.
4. Server returns failure.
5. Client receives the failure response.
Expected Result: Client receives an error message indicating login failure.

Title: Successful Logout
Preconditions: User is logged in.
Test Steps:
1. User initiates logout request.
2. Server processes the logout request.
3. Server updates session status to logged out.
4. Client receives confirmation of logout.
Expected Result: Client is logged out and receives confirmation.

Title: Modify Product with Correct Fields
Preconditions: User is logged in and has access to modify products.
Test Steps:
1. User clicks on a product.
2. User modifies the product details.
3. User clicks the "Modify" button.
4. System checks if all fields are correctly filled.
5. System applies the modifications.

Title: Modify Product with Incorrect Fields
Preconditions: User is logged in and has access to modify products.
Test Steps:
1. User clicks on a product.
2. User modifies the product details incompletely.
3. User clicks the "Modify" button.
4. System checks if all fields are correctly filled.
5. System signals an error.
Expected Result: System signals an error and does not apply the modifications.

Title: Add Product with Correct Fields
Preconditions: User is logged in and has permission to add products.
Test Steps:
1. User clicks the "Add" button.
2. User fills in the product details.
3. User clicks the "Add" button again.
4. System checks if all fields are correctly filled.
5. System adds the product.

Title: Add Product with Incorrect Fields
Preconditions: User is logged in and has permission to add products.
Test Steps:
1. User clicks the "Add" button.
2. User fills in the product details incompletely.
3. User clicks the "Add" button again.
4. System checks if all fields are correctly filled.
5. System signals an error.
Expected Result: System signals an error and does not add the product.

Title: Push Notification
Preconditions: User is logged in and has notifications enabled.
Test Steps:
1. User clicks a button.
2. System triggers the notification management process.
3. System sends a push notification.
4. System pushes notifications to the app.

Title: In-App Notification
Preconditions: User is logged in and has notifications enabled.
Test Steps:
1. User clicks a button.
2. System triggers the notification management process.
3. System sends an in-app notification.
4. System pushes notifications to the app.

Title: Notification Decision Node
Preconditions: User is logged in and has notifications enabled.
Test Steps:
1. User interacts with a new product.
2. New product decides whether to send a push or in-app notification.
3. Notification is sent to the app.
Expected Result: User receives either a push or in-app notification based on the decision made by the new product.

Title: Create User Account
Preconditions: User does not have an existing account.
Test Steps:
1. User initiates account creation request.
2. Server receives the request and creates a new user account.
3. Database stores the new user account.
4. Server confirms the account creation.
5. Client receives confirmation of account creation.

Title: Duplicate Email During Account Creation
Preconditions: User does not have an existing account but email already exists.
Test Steps:
1. User initiates account creation request with an existing email.
2. Server receives the request and attempts to create a new user account.
3. Database detects duplicate email.
4. Server returns an error.
5. Client receives an error message.
Expected Result: Client receives an error message indicating the email is already in use.

Title: Mark Seller as Preferred
Preconditions: User is logged in and has a seller to mark as preferred.
Test Steps:
1. User selects a seller.
2. User marks the seller as preferred.
3. System updates the preferred seller information.
Expected Result: Seller is marked as preferred successfully.

Title: Unmark Seller as Preferred
Preconditions: User is logged in and has a seller marked as preferred.
Test Steps:
1. User selects a seller.
2. User unmarks the seller as preferred.
3. System updates the preferred seller information.
Expected Result: Seller is unmarked as preferred successfully.

Title: Set Notification Type
Preconditions: User is logged in and has a client.
Test Steps:
1. User sets a notification type for a client.
2. System updates the notification type.

Title: Get Notification Type
Preconditions: User is logged in and has a client.
Test Steps:
1. User requests the notification type for a client.
2. System retrieves the notification type.
3. System returns the notification type.

Title: Set Vendor Rating
Preconditions: User is logged in and has a vendor.
Test Steps:
1. User sets a rating for a vendor.
2. System updates the vendor's rating.

Title: Get Vendor Rating
Preconditions: User is logged in and has a vendor.
Test Steps:
1. User requests the rating for a vendor.
2. System retrieves the vendor's rating.
3. System returns the rating.

Title: Update User Details
Preconditions: User is logged in.
Test Steps:
1. User updates their details.
2. System validates the details.
3. System updates the user's details.

Title: Retrieve User Details
Preconditions: User is logged in.
Test Steps:
1. User requests their details.
2. System retrieves the user's details.
3. System returns the details.

Title: Set User Type
Preconditions: User is logged in.
Test Steps:
1. User sets their type (seller/client).
2. System updates the user type.

Title: Get User Type
Preconditions: User is logged in.
Test Steps:
1. User requests their type (seller/client).
2. System retrieves the user type.
3. System returns the user type.

Title: Set User Image
Preconditions: User is logged in.
Test Steps:
1. User uploads an image.
2. System validates the image.
3. System updates the user's image.

Title: Retrieve User Image
Preconditions: User is logged in.
Test Steps:
1. User requests their image.
2. System retrieves the user's image.
3. System returns the image.

Title: Change User Password
Preconditions: User is logged in.
Test Data: Valid old password, valid new password.
Test Steps:
1. User changes their password.
2. System validates the old password.
3. System updates the user's password.

Title: Retrieve User Password
Preconditions: User is logged in.
Test Steps:
1. User requests their password.
2. System retrieves the user's password.
3. System returns the password.

Title: Change User Email
Preconditions: User is logged in.
Test Data: Valid old email, valid new email.
Test Steps:
1. User changes their email.
2. System validates the old email.
3. System updates the user's email.

Title: Retrieve User Email
Preconditions: User is logged in.
Test Steps:
1. User requests their email.
2. System retrieves the user's email.
3. System returns the email.

Title: Set User as Vendor
Preconditions: User is logged in.
Test Steps:
1. User sets themselves as a vendor.
2. System updates the user's vendor status.
Expected Result: User vendor status is updated successfully.

Title: Get User Vendor Status
Preconditions: User is logged in.
Test Steps:
1. User requests their vendor status.
2. System retrieves the user's vendor status.
3. System returns the vendor status.
Expected Result: User vendor status is retrieved successfully.
